title: Capsule for low and/or high viscosity compounds, piston for a usage with a capsule and system comprising a capsule and a piston
abstract: The present invention relates to a capsule for low and/or high viscosity compounds with a housing, the housing comprising a storage section with a storage volume for a storage of the compound and an application section with an application channel for an application of the compound, wherein the filling end of the storage volume is placed at a filling opening of the housing and is accessible from outside of the housing for a filling of the storage volume with the compound, wherein the application end of the application channel is placed at an application openingof the hous- ingand is accessible from outside of the housing for an application of the compound. Further, the present invention relates to a pistonfor a usage with such a capsuleand to a systemcomprising such a capsule and preferably such as piston. Additionally, the present invention relates to a method of producing a capsule with a brush tip.
claims:
Claims Sulzer Mixpac AG S14165PWO - To/Pr Claims 1. Capsule (10) for low viscosity compounds (102), in particular liquid com pounds (102), preferably for dental compounds (102), with a housing (20), the housing (20) comprising a storage section (30) with a storage volume (32) for a storage of the compound (102) and an application section (50) with an application channel (52) for an application of the compound (102), wherein the storage volume (32) comprises a filling end (36) and a dis charging end (38) and the application channel (52) comprises a storage end (54) and an application end (56), wherein the storage volume (32) comprises an essentially cylindrical middle section (34) located between the filling end (36) and the discharging end (38) to provide a piston guide for a piston (60) inserted into the storage vol ume (32), wherein the discharging end (38) of the storage volume (32) and the stor age end (54) of the application channel (52) are connected in a fluid com municating way, wherein the filling end (36) of the storage volume (32) is placed at a filling opening (22) of the housing (20) and is accessible from outside of the hous ing (20) for a filling of the storage volume (32) with the compound (102), wherein the application end (56) of the application channel (52) is placed at an application opening (22) of the housing (20) and is accessible from out side of the housing (20) for an application of the compound (102), characterized in that an inner surface (40) of the storage volume (32) comprises first sealing means (42) at and/or near the filling end (36) of the storage volume (32) for 

 providing a seal of the storage volume (32) with respect to a closing means (62) inserted into the filling opening (22) of the housing (20), wherein the first sealing means (42) comprise one or more, in particular two or more, preferably three or more, circumferential protrusions (44) projecting from the inner surface (40) toward a longitudinal axis (46) of the storage section (30). 2. Capsule (10) for high viscosity compounds (102), in particular compounds (102) with a viscosity between water and honey, preferably for dental com pounds, preferably in accordance with a capsule according to claim 1 , with a housing (20), the housing (20) comprising a storage section (30) with a storage volume (32) for a storage of the compound (102) and an application section (50) with an application channel (52) for an application of the compound (102), wherein the storage volume (32) comprises a filling end (36) and a dis charging end (38) and the application channel (52) comprises a storage end (54) and an application end (56), wherein the storage volume (32) comprises an essentially cylindrical middle section (34) positioned between the filling end (36) and the discharging end (38) to provide a piston guide for a piston (60) inserted into the storage vol ume (32), wherein the discharging end (38) of the storage volume (32) and the stor age end (54) of the application channel (52) are connected in a fluid com municating way, wherein the filling end (36) of the storage volume (32) is placed at a filling opening (22) of the housing (20) and is accessible from outside of the hous ing (20) for a filling of the storage volume (32) with the compound (102), wherein the application end (56) of the application channel (52) is placed at an application opening (24) of the housing (20) and is accessible from out side of the housing (20) for an application of the compound (102), characterized in that 

 the application section (50) comprises a brush tip (58) at the application end (56) of the application channel (52). 3. The capsule (10) of claim 1 , characterized in that the application section (50) comprises a brush tip (58) at the application end (56) of the application channel (52). 4. The capsule (10) of one of the preceding claims, wherein the first sealing means (42) and the inner surface (40) of the storage volume (32), in par ticular the storage section (30), preferably the housing (20), are composed of the same material. 5. The capsule (10) of one of the preceding claims, wherein the housing (20) is composed of at least one of the following plastic materials, wherein the plastic material is of medical grade: - Polybutylene terephthalate (PBT) - Polymethyl methacrylate (PMMA) - Polyamide (PA) - Cyclic olefin copolymer (COC) - Cyclic olefin polymer (COP). 6. The capsule (10) of claim 2 or 3, wherein a material of the brush tip (58) is softer than a material of the housing (20). 7. The capsule (10) of one of the preceding claim 2, 3 or 6, wherein the mate rial of the brush tip (58) has a hardness measured with the Shore A Durom- eter selected in the range of 20A to 95A and up to a hardness measured with the Shore D Durometer of 55D, preferably in the range of 20A to 50A. 8. The capsule (10) of one of the preceding claims 2, 3, 6 or 7, wherein the brush tip (58) is composed of a thermoplastic elastomer (TPE), in particular a medical grade TPE, and/or an ethylene vinyl acetate (EVA), in particular a medical grade ethylene vinyl acetate (EVA), with a hardness measured with the Shore A Durometer from 20A to 95A and up to a hardness measured with the Shore D Durometer of 55D, preferably in the range of 20A to 50A, and/or the housing is composed of medical grade thermoplastic elastomer (TPE) and/or medical grade ethylene vinyl acetate (EVA). 9. The capsule (10) of one of the preceding claims 2, 3, 6, 7 or 8, wherein the housing (20) and the brush tip (58) are produced in a 2-component injection molding process. 10. The capsule (10) of one of the preceding claims, wherein the application section (50) comprises application sealing means (70) for providing a seal ing of the application channel (52), preferably placed at and/or near the ap plication end (56) of the application channel (52). 11. The capsule (10) of claim 10, wherein the application sealing means (70) comprise at least one of the following items: - welding seam - heat sealing - cap - Plug (74) - foil cover (72). 12. The capsule (10) of claim 11 , wherein the foil cover comprises a multicom ponent foil. 13. The capsule (10) of one of the preceding claims 10 to 12, wherein the appli cation sealing means (70), in particular the cap and/or the plug (74) and/or the foil cover (72), are at least partly made of polybutylene terephthalate (PBT) and/or at least partly made of cyclic olefin polymer (COP), in particu lar of cyclic olefin copolymer (COC). 14. The capsule (10) of one of the preceding claims, wherein the storage vol ume (32) comprises a cardinal volume orientation (80) and the application channel (52) comprises a cardinal channel orientation (82), and wherein the cardinal volume orientation (80) angles the cardinal channel orientation (82) at an angle between 10Â° and 60Â° 15. The capsule (10) of one of the preceding claims, wherein the first sealing means (42) comprises one or more, in particular two or more, preferably three or more, circumferentially extending sealing lips (44'), optionally with the sealing lips (44') having a rounded shape projecting from the inner sur face (40) toward a longitudinal axis (46) of the storage section (30), and/or with the sealing lips (44') having a part circular cross-section in a plane per pendicular to the inner surface (40). 16. The capsule (10) of one of the preceding claims 2 to 15, wherein the brush tip (58) comprises a plurality of bristles (58'), optionally wherein the brush tip (58) respectively the plurality of bristles (58') have an outer di ameter of less than 4 mm, preferably an outer diameter selected in the range of 1 to 3 mm, especially of 1.5 to 2.5 mm. 17. The capsule (10) of one of the preceding claims 2 to 16, wherein the brush tip (58) respectively the plurality of bristles (58') have a length projecting from the application end (56) of the application channel (52) selected in the range of 1.5 to 10 mm, preferably of 2 to 7 mm and especially of 3 to 6 mm. 18. The capsule (10) of one of the preceding claims 2 to 17, wherein each bris tle (58') of the plurality of bristles (58') has a diameter selected in the range of 0.01 to 1 mm, especially of 0.05 to 0.5 mm. 19. The capsule (10) of one of the preceding claims 2 to 18, wherein the plurali ty of bristles (58') comprises between 4 and 150 bristles (58'). 20. Piston (60) for a usage with a capsule (10) according to one of the preced ing claims 1 to 19, wherein the piston (60) is adapted to be inserted into the storage volume (32), wherein a compound (102) in the storage volume (32) is forceable into the application channel (52) by a movement of the piston (60) in the storage volume (32) towards the application end (56) of the stor age volume (32). 21. The piston (60) of claim 20, wherein the piston (60) forms a closing means (62) to be inserted into the filling opening (22) of the housing (20) of the capsule (10). 22. The piston (60) according to claim 21 , wherein the piston (60) comprises second sealing means (64) to engage the first sealing means (42) for a sealing of the storage volume (32). 23. The piston (60) according to claim 21 or 22, wherein the second sealing means (64) are a circumferential sealing surface (66) of the piston (60) . 24. The piston (60) according to one of the preceding claims 21 to 23, wherein the piston (60) comprises a venting hole (68), in particular a sealable vent ing hole (68). 25 The piston (60) according to one of the preceding claims 20 to 24, wherein the piston (60) is at least partly made of polybutylene terephthalate (PBT) and/or at least partly made of a cyclic olefin polymer (COP), in particular of a cyclic olefin copolymer (COC). 26. System (100) comprising a capsule (10) and a piston (60), wherein the cap sule (10) is provided according to one of the preceding claims 1 to 19 and preferably the piston (60) is provided according to one of the preceding claims 20 to 25. 27. System (100) according to claim 26, wherein the storage volume (32) of the capsule (10) contains a low viscosity compound (102), in particular a liquid compound (102), preferably a dental compound (102), wherein the filling opening (22) of the housing (20) is sealingly closed by the piston (60). 28. System (100) according to claim 26, wherein the storage volume (32) of the capsule (10) contains a high viscosity compound (102), in particular a com pound (102) with a viscosity between water and honey, preferably a dental compound (102), wherein in particular the filling end (36) of the storage vol ume (32) and/or the filling opening (22) of the housing (20) are sealingly closed by the piston (60). 29. A method of producing a capsule (10) with a brush tip (58), preferably a capsule (10) in accordance with one of the preceding claims 2 to 19, the method comprising the steps of: - providing a mold for the brush tip (58) of the capsule (10) and injection molding the brush tip (58) in situ; - providing a mold for the remnants of the capsule (10) with the molded brush tip (58) in situ and injection molding the capsule (10) from a material different from the brush tip (58).
